blended.narrative: Killington is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 49°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.9" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 4" of snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
